detectors.description:
Purefi.burnTokenCheck(address,address,uint256) (Purefi.sol#1479-1507) has costly operations inside a loop:
	- _safeOwner = recipient (Purefi.sol#1481)

		Purefi.multiTransfer(uint256,address[],uint256[])

		Purefi._approveCheck(address,address,uint256)
